decision_commentary: All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (B), review_item (client_fit_assessment), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (approve), comment (specific — budget flag and proceed to programming), timestamp (ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (dispatch_ana_and_sol_parallel), route_to (Ana), sync_to_asana (false). Routing to Ana for Segment C parallel programming is correct. Comment is specific and preserved. Decision correctly classified as approve.
celia_routing_notes: All 11 fields present. route_to field used correctly. next_action correctly references parallel dispatch of Ana and Sol.
